subject: Tomogram reconstruction - unbinned tomogram dimension
body:
Hello Dimitry, 

I am confused with the input option for tomogram reconstruction - unbinned 
tomogram dimension.

When I put in the original tomogram dimensions (unbinned) the result 
reconstruction looks somewhat magnified and cut on the sides when compared 
to IMOD reconstruction (attachment - left IMOD reconstruction, right Warp 
reconstruction).

I used 2x binning in both Warp and IMOD.

What is the value I need to put in here actually to get the whole tomogram?

Best
Katarina
